nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 托海
nodes.summary: 托海是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联22种鸟类，包括红头林鹧鸪、Cocos cuckoo、Malaysian eared nightjar等22种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: Vermilion flycatcher
nodes.summary: Vermilion flycatcher（Vermilion flycatcher，学名 Pyrocephalus obscurus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于托海，常见栖息地包括稀树草原，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: North American populations generally migrate by late August and return between February and April. Their ability to migrate likely aided their wide colonization of the Americas. Vermilion flycatchers prefer somewhat open areas and are found in trees or shrubs in savanna, scrub, agricultural areas, riparian woodlands, and desert as well, but usually near water. links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Populations have declined because of habitat loss, though the species remains abundant
